name: Joe Rogan
justification: Central node in alternative influence network. Subject of Bozzi 2025, Rae 2023.
platform_note: Primary distribution is Spotify; YouTube clips channel. Full episodes on YouTube resumed 2024.

name: Theo Von
justification: Comedy-first podcast increasingly featuring political guests. Rogan network adjacent.

name: Andrew Schulz
justification: Flagrant podcast, comedy-driven but covers political/cultural topics with anti-establishment framing.

name: Ben Shapiro
justification: Core case in Dowling & Miller 2022. Daily Wire ecosystem anchor.

name: Dan Bongino
justification: Core case in Dowling & Miller 2022. Former law enforcement, anti-media framing.

name: Matt Walsh
justification: Prominent culture-war commentator, documentary producer (What Is a Woman?).
platform_note: Uses Daily Wire channel; filter by host name in title/description.

name: Steven Crowder
justification: Louder with Crowder. Confrontational style, comedy-debate hybrid, deplatforming history.

name: Charlie Kirk
justification: Turning Point USA. Campus activism, youth conservative mobilization.

name: Candace Owens
justification: Cross-platform prominence, contrarian identity positioning, conspiracy-adjacent since 2024.

name: Tucker Carlson
justification: Post-Fox independent show. Bridges legacy broadcast and podcast ecology.

name: Andrew Tate
justification: Central manosphere figure. 'Ideological entrepreneur' per recent scholarship.
platform_note: Frequently deplatformed. Use available mirrors/re-uploads with caution for dating.

name: Fresh and Fit
justification: Red-pill dating content with political commentary. Manosphere-politics crossover.

name: Pearl Davis
justification: Female anti-feminist voice in manosphere. Contrarian gender positioning.

name: Jordan Peterson
justification: Key bridge figure between intellectual respectability and grievance politics.

name: Tim Pool
justification: Claims journalistic identity (Occupy Wall Street origins). Anti-mainstream epistemic authority.

name: Glenn Greenwald
justification: Actual journalist history. Shifted to anti-establishment independent media. Interesting authority claim.

name: Russell Brand
justification: Comedian-to-political-commentator pipeline. Conspiracy-adjacent. Deplatforming case.

name: Jimmy Dore
justification: Left-to-right pipeline figure. Comedian-journalist hybrid, anti-establishment framing.

name: Lex Fridman
justification: Long-form interviewer. Authority via guest prestige. Rogan network adjacent.

name: Patrick Bet-David
justification: Valuetainment. Business/entrepreneurial framing of political authority.

name: Dave Rubin
justification: Rubin Report. 'Classical liberal' to conservative pipeline. Intellectual self-positioning.

name: Michael Knowles
justification: Explicitly Catholic-intellectual framing. Different authority register than populist hosts.
platform_note: Daily Wire channel; filter by host name.
